title: 2026 Prompt Engineering with Claude and Codex
description: Writers, analysts, developers, and technical leads who need empirically tested prompts for current Claude and Codex chat, coding, tool, and long-running workflows. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate prompt contracts, context engineering, examples, tools, coding, and long tasks through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate current claude and codex differences and shared principles through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate evaluation, security, versioning, monitoring, and release gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

competencies.statement: Define the user, task, decision, acceptable output, and material failure modes before drafting a prompt.
misconceptions: Prompt quality can be judged without a defined task outcome.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define the user, task, decision, acceptable output, and material failure modes before drafting a prompt.

competencies.statement: Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.
misconceptions: A prompt is good when one impressive example works.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.

competencies.statement: Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
misconceptions: The longest initial prompt is the fairest baseline.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.

competencies.statement: Build normal, boundary, adversarial, and changed-context evaluation cases.
misconceptions: Random happy-path examples reveal production reliability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build normal, boundary, adversarial, and changed-context evaluation cases.

competencies.statement: Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.
misconceptions: An LLM judge eliminates the need for calibrated human review.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.

competencies.statement: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.
misconceptions: All model surfaces differ only in visual appearance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.

competencies.statement: Verify current model and tool capabilities from official documentation rather than remembered names.
misconceptions: A remembered model list remains current indefinitely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify current model and tool capabilities from official documentation rather than remembered names.

competencies.statement: Match reasoning effort and autonomy to task complexity, reversibility, and verification cost.
misconceptions: Maximum reasoning is always the fastest and cheapest option.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Match reasoning effort and autonomy to task complexity, reversibility, and verification cost.

competencies.statement: Allocate context to governing instructions, task evidence, examples, and tool results according to value.
misconceptions: More context always improves output quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Allocate context to governing instructions, task evidence, examples, and tool results according to value.

competencies.statement: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.
misconceptions: One provider prompt should be copied unchanged everywhere.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.

competencies.statement: State the desired result and audience before prescribing implementation steps.
misconceptions: A prompt should begin with every action the model must take.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: State the desired result and audience before prescribing implementation steps.

competencies.statement: Provide context that can change the result and route the agent to authoritative sources.
misconceptions: Attaching the entire repository is always optimal.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide context that can change the result and route the agent to authoritative sources.

competencies.statement: Specify output structure, granularity, evidence, and machine-readable constraints when they matter.
misconceptions: The word professional defines a complete output format.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Specify output structure, granularity, evidence, and machine-readable constraints when they matter.

competencies.statement: Name material do-not-change, authorization, safety, and escalation boundaries.
misconceptions: More prohibitions always make an agent safer and more capable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Name material do-not-change, authorization, safety, and escalation boundaries.

competencies.statement: Define observable completion checks including tests, review, and unresolved-evidence reporting.
misconceptions: Done means the model produced a fluent answer.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define observable completion checks including tests, review, and unresolved-evidence reporting.

competencies.statement: Rank repository files, official docs, generated artifacts, tests, and user statements by authority for the task.
misconceptions: The first matching file is the source of truth.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rank repository files, official docs, generated artifacts, tests, and user statements by authority for the task.

competencies.statement: Provide paths, search terms, dependency boundaries, and examples that route efficient discovery.
misconceptions: Context engineering means pasting all potentially related text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide paths, search terms, dependency boundaries, and examples that route efficient discovery.

competencies.statement: Separate one-turn constraints from durable repository instructions such as AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.
misconceptions: Every task detail belongs in a permanent instruction file.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate one-turn constraints from durable repository instructions such as AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.

competencies.statement: Detect conflicting instructions and evidence and apply a documented precedence rule.
misconceptions: Models silently reconcile contradictory sources correctly.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect conflicting instructions and evidence and apply a documented precedence rule.

competencies.statement: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.
misconceptions: Once loaded, external documentation never needs revalidation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.

competencies.statement: Choose relevant and diverse examples that cover boundaries without teaching accidental shortcuts.
misconceptions: One ideal example is sufficient for every input distribution.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose relevant and diverse examples that cover boundaries without teaching accidental shortcuts.

competencies.statement: Include counterexamples and near misses when category boundaries are material.
misconceptions: Only successful examples can teach desired behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Include counterexamples and near misses when category boundaries are material.

competencies.statement: Separate instructions, context, examples, and variable data with clear headings or provider-appropriate tags.
misconceptions: Decorative structure improves performance regardless of content.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate instructions, context, examples, and variable data with clear headings or provider-appropriate tags.

competencies.statement: Use explicit schemas and validation when downstream code requires structured output.
misconceptions: Asking for JSON guarantees syntactically valid schema-conforming data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use explicit schemas and validation when downstream code requires structured output.

competencies.statement: Version fixed prompt text separately from variable inputs and evaluation data.
misconceptions: Prompts are informal text and do not need change control.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version fixed prompt text separately from variable inputs and evaluation data.

competencies.statement: Request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.
misconceptions: Reliable reasoning requires the model to print every private thought.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.

competencies.statement: Use planning before implementation when scope, dependencies, or user choices are materially uncertain.
misconceptions: Planning is overhead for every task regardless of complexity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use planning before implementation when scope, dependencies, or user choices are materially uncertain.

competencies.statement: Decompose work around independently verifiable outcomes and dependency order.
misconceptions: Breaking a task into the most files produces the best plan.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Decompose work around independently verifiable outcomes and dependency order.

competencies.statement: Ask for targeted final checks tied to known failure modes instead of vague self-critique.
misconceptions: Telling a model to double-check guarantees correctness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Ask for targeted final checks tied to known failure modes instead of vague self-critique.

competencies.statement: Require bounded uncertainty, missing evidence, and blockers to remain visible.
misconceptions: A confident answer should never mention uncertainty.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require bounded uncertainty, missing evidence, and blockers to remain visible.

competencies.statement: Write tool descriptions and schemas that make capability, inputs, outputs, and side effects unambiguous.
misconceptions: The tool name alone is enough for reliable selection.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write tool descriptions and schemas that make capability, inputs, outputs, and side effects unambiguous.

competencies.statement: Sequence read-only discovery before mutations unless the user explicitly requests an immediate safe action.
misconceptions: An agent should change state to learn what the state is.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Sequence read-only discovery before mutations unless the user explicitly requests an immediate safe action.

competencies.statement: Base the next decision on actual tool results and distinguish inference from observation.
misconceptions: A successful tool call proves the intended outcome occurred.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Base the next decision on actual tool results and distinguish inference from observation.

competencies.statement: Require approval for consequential, external, destructive, or authority-expanding actions.
misconceptions: User interest in a topic authorizes every related mutation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require approval for consequential, external, destructive, or authority-expanding actions.

competencies.statement: Handle timeouts, partial results, retries, and alternate evidence without looping blindly.
misconceptions: Repeating the identical failing tool call is a robust recovery strategy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Handle timeouts, partial results, retries, and alternate evidence without looping blindly.

competencies.statement: Name desired behavior, relevant area, preserved contracts, and authorized refactor scope.
misconceptions: A total rewrite is implied whenever existing code is low quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Name desired behavior, relevant area, preserved contracts, and authorized refactor scope.

competencies.statement: Ground implementation in repository commands, architecture, dependency policy, and local instructions.
misconceptions: Generic best practices override project-specific contracts.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Ground implementation in repository commands, architecture, dependency policy, and local instructions.

competencies.statement: Specify risk-proportionate tests and observable regression checks.
misconceptions: Asking for tests without naming behavior produces complete coverage.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Specify risk-proportionate tests and observable regression checks.

competencies.statement: Request intentional, reviewable changes while preserving unrelated user work.
misconceptions: Formatting every file improves every pull request.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Request intentional, reviewable changes while preserving unrelated user work.

competencies.statement: Require command output, behavior checks, and a concise unresolved-risk handoff.
misconceptions: A code diff is sufficient proof that a change works.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require command output, behavior checks, and a concise unresolved-risk handoff.

competencies.statement: Capture a minimal reproduction, exact error, environment, and last-known-good boundary before repair.
misconceptions: The first plausible cause should be fixed immediately.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Capture a minimal reproduction, exact error, environment, and last-known-good boundary before repair.

competencies.statement: Rank competing hypotheses and choose discriminating checks.
misconceptions: Collecting more logs is useful even without a hypothesis.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rank competing hypotheses and choose discriminating checks.

competencies.statement: Prompt for the smallest cause-level repair and a regression test.
misconceptions: Suppressing an error is equivalent to fixing its cause.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prompt for the smallest cause-level repair and a regression test.

competencies.statement: Define review baseline, risk categories, and evidence required for actionable findings.
misconceptions: A code review should list every stylistic preference.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define review baseline, risk categories, and evidence required for actionable findings.

competencies.statement: Test prompts and code against misleading context, malformed inputs, and instruction injection.
misconceptions: Normal examples predict behavior under adversarial input.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test prompts and code against misleading context, malformed inputs, and instruction injection.

competencies.statement: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
misconceptions: Conversation length itself preserves every important decision.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.

competencies.statement: Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
misconceptions: Compaction always preserves minor but critical constraints.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.

competencies.statement: Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
misconceptions: Every new message should restart the entire task.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.

competencies.statement: Checkpoint at verified boundaries with rerunnable commands and safe restart instructions.
misconceptions: A long task should defer all verification until the end.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Checkpoint at verified boundaries with rerunnable commands and safe restart instructions.

competencies.statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
misconceptions: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.

competencies.statement: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
misconceptions: Claude should infer unstated above-and-beyond requirements.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.

competencies.statement: Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.
misconceptions: XML tags compensate for weak task definitions.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.

competencies.statement: Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.
misconceptions: Claude must always call every available tool.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.

competencies.statement: Match adaptive or extended thinking to complex tasks without demanding verbose reasoning output.
misconceptions: Extended thinking improves every simple or latency-sensitive task.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Match adaptive or extended thinking to complex tasks without demanding verbose reasoning output.

competencies.statement: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.
misconceptions: Claude Code needs only a feature request to modify any repository safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide Claude Code repository guidance, verification commands, permissions, and durable project context.

competencies.statement: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
misconceptions: Codex requires a rigid magic prompt syntax.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.

competencies.statement: Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
misconceptions: Codex should guess product requirements to preserve momentum.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.

competencies.statement: Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
misconceptions: AGENTS.md should contain every task ever performed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.

competencies.statement: Separate prompt instructions, AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, hooks, and config by scope and enforcement need.
misconceptions: All Codex customization belongs in one global prompt.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate prompt instructions, AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, hooks, and config by scope and enforcement need.

competencies.statement: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.
misconceptions: Codex-generated code can skip independent verification.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.

competencies.statement: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
misconceptions: Text inside a retrieved document is safe to follow as instruction.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.

competencies.statement: Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.
misconceptions: Prompt injection is solved by one warning sentence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.

competencies.statement: Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
misconceptions: Hidden system prompts are a secure secret store.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.

competencies.statement: Validate model outputs before execution, publication, or use in security decisions.
misconceptions: Structured model output can be executed without validation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate model outputs before execution, publication, or use in security decisions.

competencies.statement: Maintain adversarial cases and re-run them when prompts, models, tools, or data change.
misconceptions: A one-time red-team exercise permanently secures a prompt.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Maintain adversarial cases and re-run them when prompts, models, tools, or data change.

competencies.statement: Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.
misconceptions: Prompt text can be edited in production without traceability.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.

competencies.statement: Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
misconceptions: Average score alone captures every important regression.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.

competencies.statement: Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.
misconceptions: Offline evaluation removes the need for production monitoring.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.

competencies.statement: Use controlled experiments, canaries, and rollback criteria for prompt changes.
misconceptions: Prompt changes are too small to require release controls.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use controlled experiments, canaries, and rollback criteria for prompt changes.

competencies.statement: Defend prompt design choices with evidence across Claude, Codex, changed cases, and limitations.
misconceptions: A portfolio of successful screenshots proves transferable prompt skill.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend prompt design choices with evidence across Claude, Codex, changed cases, and limitations.

credential.title: 2026 Prompt Engineering with Claude and Codex Certificate
